sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking agent
if previous_frame:
    prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation
    curr_seg = current_frame.segmentation
    
    from collections import Counter
    prev_colors = Counter(n['color'] for n in prev_seg['nodes'])
    curr_colors = Counter(n['color'] for n in curr_seg['nodes'])
    
    print("Color counts diff:")
    all_colors = set(prev_colors.keys()) | set(curr_colors.keys())
    for c in sorted(all_colors):
        pc = prev_colors.get(c, 0)
        cc = curr_colors.get(c, 0)
        if pc != cc:
            print(f"  {c}: {pc} -> {cc}")
    
    # Check pixel counts
    prev_pixels = Counter(n['color'] for n in prev_seg['nodes'] for _ in range(n['pixels']))
    curr_pixels = Counter(n['color'] for n in curr_seg['nodes'] for _ in range(n['pixels']))
    
    print("\nPixel counts diff:")
    all_c = set(prev_pixels.keys()) | set(curr_pixels.keys())
    for c in sorted(all_c):
        pp = prev_pixels.get(c, 0)
        cp = curr_pixels.get(c, 0)
        if pp != cp:
            print(f"  {c}: {pp} -> {cp}")

# Try moving LEFT once more to get to col 20
result = action(['LEFT'])
print(f"\nAfter LEFT: agent at col?")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
agent = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
b = agent['boundary']
cols = [p[1] for p in b]
print(f"Agent cols: [{min(cols)}-{max(cols)}]")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
